# MDLAxisAlignedBoundingBox

**Structure**

The minimal volume containing an object, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLObject/boundingBox(atTime:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
struct MDLAxisAlignedBoundingBox
```

## Initializers

- **init()**
- **init(maxBounds:minBounds:)**

## Instance Properties

- **maxBounds**: The corner of the bounding box with the highest x-, y-, and z-coordinate values.
- **minBounds**: The corner of the bounding box with the lowest x-, y-, and z-coordinate values.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Sendable
